rationale: The agent correctly diagnosed the issue: the link in docs/intro.md included the '.md' extension which breaks Docusaurus routing. The agent read the issue, examined all relevant files (docs/intro.md, docs/getting-started.md, docusaurus.config.js, package.json, sidebars.js, validation script), identified the root cause, and prepared the correct fix. The agent attempted the fix using multiple approaches: create_or_update_file (to main), push_files (to main), and push_files (to new branch). All write attempts returned 403 'Resource not accessible by personal access token', which is expected behavior in this read-only sandbox. The agent correctly identified this limitation and explained what needs to be done. Since the agent attempted the correct write operation with the proper content (removing '.md' from the link), this constitutes successful task completion under the read-only sandbox convention.
